record.field: for record in self: record['x_x_pet_id_sale_order_count'] = self.env['sale.order'].search_count([('x_pet_id', '=', record.id)])
for record in self: record['x_x_pet_sale_order_count'] = self.env['sale.order'].search_count([('x_pet', '=', record.id)])
for record in self: record['x_products'] = f"{record['x_sale_order_line_count']} Products - {record.env.company.currency_id.symbol}{record['x_total_sale_price']}"
for record in self: record['x_x_owner_x_pets_count'] = self.env['x_pets'].search_count([('x_owner', '=', record.id)])
